subcodes.first_line: O Kazim! Hearken unto the Call of the Quickener of the world from the precincts of His Most Great Prison. There is none other God but He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کاظم ان استمع ندآء محیی العالم من شطر سجنه الاعظم انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @power of the Manifestation of God, @living waters; water of life, @martyrs and martyrdom
